creator: gogo@cs.uni-sb.de
text:
Port of ruby-debug 0.9.3

WWW: http://rubyforge.org/projects/ruby-debug

Fix: 

ruby-debug is split up into two ruby gems:

- ruby-debug-base: the implementation of the debugger
http://w5.cs.uni-sb.de/~gogo/patches/new-ports/devel/rubygem-ruby-debug-base/

- ruby-debug: a CLI to ruby-debug-base
http://w5.cs.uni-sb.de/~gogo/patches/new-ports/devel/rubygem-ruby-debug/
